x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CSM KB articles are the primary source for Now Assist CSM AI Search and case deflection.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create KB articles covering top customer inquiry categories. Target: 50+ published active articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search indexes all accessible KBs — focus on quality and coverage over KB naming conventions.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c74
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CSM KB articles are the primary source for Now Assist CSM AI Search and case deflection.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSM Knowledge Base Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check all published active KB articles — Now Assist CSM AI Search
    // indexes across all accessible KBs regardless of KB name
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    ga.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active KB articles';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published KB articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search has sufficient content for customer-facing self-service deflection.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles (target: 50+). Now Assist CSM AI Search coverage will be limited — expand KB content for key customer inquiry categories.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles. Insufficient KB content for meaningful Now Assist CSM AI Search and self-service deflection.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CSM</module><number>CHK0000417</number><order>50</order><remediation_guidance>Create KB articles covering top customer inquiry categories. Target: 50+ published active articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search indexes all accessible KBs — focus on quality and coverage over KB naming conventions.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>0ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c74</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSM Knowledge Base Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c74</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
